name: Rainbow Snake
short_description: Rainbow snake is a beautiful classic game. Eating food, snake painted in different colors. Collect a colorful snake.
detailed_description:
Rainbow Snake Is A Beautiful Classic Game.

Eating Food, Snake Painted In Different Colors.
Collect a colorful snake and avoid the green walls.

  • Simple Game Mechanics
  • Use arrows or WASD for control
  • You will lose when you hit the wall
about_the_game:
